should_trigger.prompt: Review the PR comments and address them
There are review comments on the pull request — help me respond
Fetch and address the PR review feedback
Help me with pr review patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Create a pull request for my changes
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: The reviewer left comments on PR #42 — help me address each one
After fixing the bug, also check if pr review needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code I just wrote for quality and correctness
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
